name: Aqua's Utils
description: A toolbox plugin: surfaces extension errors as toasts/tray, and launches & manages a self-contained aquatils-solver (or a remote one you run) for Cloudflare/DDoS-Guard sites.
author: aquaryuo

networkAccess.reasoning: Reads the local Seanime log API (loopback) to collect reported extension errors; talks to a local or user-configured remote solver to manage sessions; downloads the aquatils-solver release from GitHub for the self-contained binary mode.

commandScopes.description: Launch the downloaded aquatils-solver binary on Linux/macOS (Binary mode); strips macOS quarantine and chmods before exec.
Launch the downloaded aquatils-solver binary on Windows (Binary mode), and stop processes via taskkill.
